mapper.update: update project_generate_task set project_id = #{aiProjectSuggestion.projectId}, ai_project_name = #{aiProjectSuggestion.projectName}, ai_description = #{aiProjectSuggestion.description}, ai_project_type = #{aiProjectSuggestion.projectType}, ai_tech_stack = #{aiProjectSuggestion.techStack} where task_code = #{taskCode}
